name: extension skips an issue without the security label even when the body mentions security keywords
command: mkdir -p fixtures && printf '{"number":99,"labels":["bug"],"body":"mentions sql injection"}\n' > fixtures/issues.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/issue-tracker.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --upstream-stub fixtures/issues.jsonl --emit patterns --out patterns.jsonl 2>err.txt && [ ! -s patterns.jsonl ] && grep -q 'matched=0' err.txt && echo ok 1>&2
